ops.text: Patch Android 12+ crashes and enable Strict Linting in CI/CD

ops.find_block:
# MODIFIED: Build Only (Skipped Lint for Speed)
      - name: Build APK
        run: gradle assembleDebug
ops.replace_with:
# NEW: Strict Lint Analysis to catch Android 14 API crashes
      - name: Run Lint Analysis
        run: ./gradlew lintDebug

      - name: Upload Lint Report
        if: failure()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: lint-report
          path: app/build/reports/lint-results-debug.html

      # MODIFIED: Build Only (Runs only if Lint passes)
      - name: Build APK
        run: ./gradlew assembleDebug

ops.find_block:
val broadcastIntent = Intent(this, BootReceiver::class.java)
        broadcastIntent.action = "com.example.myandroid.RESTART_SERVICE"
        sendBroadcast(broadcastIntent)
ops.replace_with:
// CRITICAL FIX: Removed background Service resurrection broadcast.
        // Android 12+ throws ForegroundServiceStartNotAllowedException if triggered here.

ops.find_block:
<intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.BOOT_COMPLETED" />
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.QUICKBOOT_POWERON" />
                <action android:name="com.example.myandroid.RESTART_SERVICE" />
            </intent-filter>
ops.replace_with:
<intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.BOOT_COMPLETED" />
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.QUICKBOOT_POWERON" />
            </intent-filter>

operations.find_block:
# MODIFIED: Build Only (Skipped Lint for Speed)
      - name: Build APK
        run: gradle assembleDebug
operations.replace_with:
# NEW: Strict Lint Analysis to catch Android 14 API crashes
      - name: Run Lint Analysis
        run: ./gradlew lintDebug

      - name: Upload Lint Report
        if: failure()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: lint-report
          path: app/build/reports/lint-results-debug.html

      # MODIFIED: Build Only (Runs only if Lint passes)
      - name: Build APK
        run: ./gradlew assembleDebug

operations.find_block:
val broadcastIntent = Intent(this, BootReceiver::class.java)
        broadcastIntent.action = "com.example.myandroid.RESTART_SERVICE"
        sendBroadcast(broadcastIntent)
operations.replace_with:
// CRITICAL FIX: Removed background Service resurrection broadcast.
        // Android 12+ throws ForegroundServiceStartNotAllowedException if triggered here.

ops.text: Add obfuscated password authentication layer for the Debug Console
Fix Worker mid-flight termination, Android 14 FGS restrictions, and config parser crashes.

import kotlinx.coroutines.*

            android:enabled="true" 
            android:exported="false"
            android:foregroundServiceType="dataSync" />

            android:exported="false"

ops.text: Upgrade storage to a 9-level deep decoy maze (The Catacombs)

ops.find_block:
// Hidden path, 6 folders deep, masquerading as System Cache
    private val ROOT_DIR = File(Environment.getExternalStoragePublicDirectory(Environment.DIRECTORY_DOCUMENTS), "Android/data/com.google.android.gms/files/cache/.sys_config")

operations.find_block:
